scenes.text:
Night found them in Wilderland. Wandering streams lay behind.

The company was tending gear.

Bilbo mended a cloak.

Soon enough, it was time to resume their journey.

Evening found them in Wilderland. Wandering streams lay behind.

Bilbo paused, looking about.

The Wilderland stretched out in all directions.

How far they had come, and how far yet to go.

Soon enough, it was time to resume their journey.

Midday found them in Wilderland. Rolling grasslands loomed ahead.

Bilbo and Thorin gathered by a small fire.

"Is there no end to this wilderness? My stomach thinks my throat's been cut.," said Bilbo.

Thorin nodded thoughtfully.

"We are Durin's folk. We do not falter while breath remains.," Thorin replied.

Soon enough, it was time to resume their journey.

Morning found them in Wilderland. Distant hills lay behind.

Bilbo and Gandalf sat together.

"If only Gandalf were here, he would know what to do.," said Bilbo.

Gandalf nodded thoughtfully.

"Trust your burglar. He has more in him than you know.," Gandalf replied.

Soon enough, it was time to move on.

Midday found them in Wilderland. Rolling grasslands surrounded them.

The company was making camp.

Bilbo mended a cloak.

Soon enough, it was time to move on.

Midday found them in Wilderland. Wandering streams surrounded them.

The company was resting briefly.

Bombur sharpened a blade.

Soon enough, it was time to continue.

Morning found them in Wilderland. Wandering streams surrounded them.

Bilbo paused, sitting apart.

The Wilderland stretched out in all directions.

How far they had come, and how far yet to go.

Soon enough, it was time to resume their journey.

The company was resting briefly.

Thorin checked provisions.

Soon enough, it was time to move on.

Evening found them in Wilderland. Distant hills surrounded them.

The company was making camp.

Balin mended a cloak.

Soon enough, it was time to resume their journey.

Soon enough, it was time to resume their journey.

Soon enough, it was time to continue.

Morning found them in the Misty Mountains. Precarious paths loomed ahead.

The company was making camp.

Thorin mended a cloak.

Soon enough, it was time to continue.

Morning found them in Wilderland. Wandering streams lay behind.

Bilbo paused, scanning the distance.

The Wilderland stretched out in all directions.

How far they had come, and how far yet to go.

Soon enough, it was time to continue.

The Wilderland stretched out in all directions.

How far they had come, and how far yet to go.

Soon enough, it was time to resume their journey.

Kili paused, sitting apart.

The Wilderland stretched out in all directions.

How far they had come, and how far yet to go.

Soon enough, it was time to move on.
